export_xs_hrpl_pd_smart_salary.description: DAG выгружает данные из таблиц схемы default (поток через xStream)

tables.sql_stmt_load_delta:
f"""
            insert into motivation_export.smart_salary_delta (
                export_time,
                insert_time,
                tenant,
                company,
                person_id,
                employee_id,
                report_date,
                deviation
            )
            with
                t_10_insight_for_postgre as (
                    select 'sberbank' as tenant
                           , 'paosberbank' as company
                           , uuid as person_id
                           , right(concat('00000000', toString(i_pernr)), 8) as employee_id
                           , toDate(parseDateTimeBestEffortOrZero(replaceAll(visitParamExtractRaw(json, 'report_date'), '"', ''))) as report_date
                           , trim(visitParamExtractRaw(json, 'deviation')) as deviation_str
                           , toDecimal32(deviation_str, 2) AS deviation
                           , date_insert as insert_time
                    from default.t_insights_for_postgre
                    where flag_ins = 10 and i_pernr > 0
                          and ({get_delta_condition_placeholder('smart_salary')})
                          and report_date is not null
                          and deviation_str <> ''
                    order by uuid, i_pernr, report_date, date_insert desc
                    limit 1 by uuid, i_pernr, report_date
                ),
                t_10_insight_by_person as (
                    select tenant
                           , company
                           , person_id
                           , right(concat('00000000', person_parameter_text), 8) as employee_id
                           , report_date_from as report_date
                           , trim(visitParamExtractRaw(json, 'deviation')) as deviation_str
                           , toDecimal32(deviation_str, 2) AS deviation
                           , insert_time
                    from insights.insights_by_person final
                    where flag_ins = 10
                          and report_type = 0
                          and ({get_delta_condition_placeholder('smart_salary')})
                          and deviation_str <> ''
                    order by flag_ins, report_type, report_date_from, tenant, person_id, employee_id, structure_type
                    limit 1 by flag_ins, report_type, report_date_from, tenant, person_id, employee_id
                )
            select 
                   {get_export_time_placeholder('smart_salary')} as export_time
                   , insert_time
                   , tenant
                   , company
                   , person_id
                   , employee_id
                   , report_date
                   , deviation
            from t_10_insight_for_postgre
            union all
            select
                   {get_export_time_placeholder('smart_salary')} as export_time
                   , insert_time
                   , tenant
                   , company
                   , person_id
                   , employee_id

f"""
            insert into evolution_export.onsiteactivities_workload_exp(
                insert_time,
				id,
				activity_id,
				teacher_id,
				duration,
				tenant
            )
				select
                    t1.insert_time,
					t1.id,
					t1.activity_id,
					t1.teacher_id,
					t1.duration,
					t1.tenant
                from evolution.onsiteactivities_workload t1
				LEFT JOIN (SELECT *, nonkey_hash FROM evolution_export.onsiteactivities_workload_exp) AS t2
				ON t1.id = t2.id AND t1.teacher_id = t2.teacher_id
				WHERE (t2.nonkey_hash IS NULL OR t2.nonkey_hash != sipHash64(t1.activity_id, t1.duration, t1.tenant))
                AND  t1.insert_time > (select coalesce(max(insert_time), '1970-01-01') from evolution_export.onsiteactivities_workload_exp)
        """
